title: Incident Playbook
objective: Contain governance regressions while preserving evidence and deterministic trace continuity.
trigger_conditions: Service-node production release without explicit human architect gate.
Traceability or fallback guarantee broken after migration.
execution_steps: Freeze the affected service or MCP change.
Capture evidence refs and trace head hash.
Apply containment according to the service contract bundle runbook.
Record incident summary and post-incident actions.
If caused by migration release, require a PM corrective brief before unfreeze.
rollback_condition: Validation checks do not pass on main.
Human architect sign-off for reopening is missing.
evidence_outputs: Incident summary with linked evidence refs.
